name: Bastion AI Gateway
description: Local-first security gateway for LLM requests — DLP scanning, tool call monitoring, audit logging.

autoStart.description: Automatically start Bastion when OpenClaw gateway starts

setProxy.description: Automatically set HTTPS_PROXY and NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS env vars

autoStart.label: Auto Start
autoStart.help: Start Bastion automatically with OpenClaw gateway

port.label: Port
port.help: Port for Bastion to listen on (0 = random available port)

setProxy.label: Set Proxy Env
setProxy.help: Automatically configure HTTPS_PROXY so LLM traffic routes through Bastion
